purpose: Iteration 1: Resolve tau=0.0 paradox + fix critical paper issues

tasks.name: tau=0.0 vs naive T=16 Pilot (Paradox Resolution)
tasks.description: Compare CD-SSD(tau=0.9) vs CD-SSD(tau=0.0) vs naive-T16 vs M1+CD-SSD(tau=0.9) vs M1+naive-T16 on 50 GSM8K samples, seed=42. Key question: does tau=0.0 outperform naive T=16? Does M1+CD-SSD(tau=0.9) outperform M1+naive-T16?
tasks.pass_criteria: All 5 conditions measured; QAS values recorded for each

decision_rule.tau0_beats_naiveT16: CD-SSD acceptance gate has inherent value; mechanistic claim is justified
decision_rule.tau0_approx_naiveT16: Accept gate adds no value; reframe CD-SSD as step-reduction method
decision_rule.M1_cdssd_beats_M1_naiveT16: Synergy is specifically from frozen-token KV anchor effect
decision_rule.M1_naiveT16_ortho_gt_1: Synergy comes from step-reduction + KV, not from CD-SSD frozen tokens

tasks.name: tau=0.0 vs naive T=16 Full Validation
tasks.description: Full validation of pilot results on 200 GSM8K, seeds {42, 123}. Run only after pilot confirms direction.
tasks.pass_criteria: Both seeds complete; Ortho values computed for M1+naive-T16 vs M1+CD-SSD(tau=0.9)

tasks.name: Remove fabricated Wilcoxon p<0.05 claim from paper
tasks.description: Find and remove the Wilcoxon signed-rank p<0.05 claim in paper.md and main.tex. Replace with multi-seed consistency statement (seed 42 Ortho=1.292, seed 123 Ortho=1.478 both confirm super-multiplicativity).
tasks.pass_criteria: No fabricated statistical claims in paper

tasks.name: Fix failure mode atlas numbers from actual Pareto data
tasks.description: Replace analytically-derived atlas values with actual values from Pareto JSON files in results/. Run from actual data.
tasks.pass_criteria: Atlas values match Pareto JSON files

tasks.name: Paper revision incorporating tau=0.0 results and all fixes
tasks.description: Revise paper.md and main.tex to: (1) report tau=0.0 paradox results, (2) remove Wilcoxon, (3) fix atlas numbers, (4) clarify QAS penalty formula, (5) reframe CD-SSD contribution appropriately.
tasks.pass_criteria: Paper revision complete, all critical issues addressed
